methods.name: profiler.capture-stop
methods.summary: finish + return the armed profiler capture

methods.name: set-parent
methods.summary: set-parent {entity, parent?} — reparent (absent/0 parent detaches to root)

methods.name: get-world-transform
methods.summary: get-world-transform {entity} — the entity's composed world translation + scale

methods.name: stop
methods.summary: stop play and restore the authored scene

methods.name: get-animation-state
methods.summary: a rig's playhead, clip, wrap, and speed

methods.name: list-clips
methods.summary: the animation clips in the project catalog

methods.name: play-animation
methods.summary: play a clip on a rig (previews in Edit too)

methods.name: pause-animation
methods.summary: stop advancing time, keep the pose shown

methods.name: stop-preview
methods.summary: clear the Edit preview and stop (revert to rest)

methods.name: get-skeleton-overlay
methods.summary: the line-skeleton overlay toggle, axes, and joint size

methods.name: set-skeleton-overlay
methods.summary: the selected rig's line-skeleton viewport overlay (show|axes|jointSize)

methods.name: set-skeleton-highlight
methods.summary: tint a previewed rig's joint by its get-rig node index (-1 clears)

methods.name: get-foot-ik
methods.summary: a rig's foot-IK enable, ground height, and chain count

methods.name: set-foot-ik
methods.summary: toggle a rig's kinematic foot IK (enabled|groundHeight)

methods.name: get-script-status
methods.summary: play state, live script instances, error high-water

methods.name: physics-state
methods.summary: live physics world summary (active, body + dynamic counts)

methods.name: fit-collider
methods.summary: re-fit a Collider's shape to the entity's mesh AABB

methods.name: move-character
methods.summary: set a character controller's desired walk velocity

methods.name: enable-ragdoll
methods.summary: go limp / restore animation on a rig's powered ragdoll

methods.name: set-ragdoll
methods.summary: drive a rig's active-ragdoll blend (motors, body/bone weight)

methods.name: get-ragdoll
methods.summary: a rig's ragdoll presence, active flag, and mean blend weight

methods.name: set-script-override
methods.summary: write one per-instance script field override

methods.name: scan-assets
methods.summary: rescan assets/ and reconcile the catalog from disk

methods.name: extract-subasset
methods.summary: extract-subasset {asset, subAsset} [dest] — slice an embedded sub-asset to a standalone file

methods.name: clear-extraction
methods.summary: clear-extraction {asset, subAsset} — revert an extracted sub-asset to the embedded chunk

methods.name: reimport-model
methods.summary: reimport-model {asset} — re-bake from source (skip if unchanged), preserving extractions

methods.name: model-info
methods.summary: model-info {asset} — a container's sub-assets, source recipe, and byte footprint

methods.name: asset-references
methods.summary: asset-references {asset} — what references this / what this references + footprint

methods.name: get-rig
methods.summary: get-rig {asset} — a model's bone tree + clips, read from its .smodel container

methods.name: enter-rig-preview
methods.summary: enter-rig-preview {asset} — open a model's rig in an isolated preview scene

methods.name: exit-rig-preview
methods.summary: exit-rig-preview — close the rig preview and restore the authored scene + camera

methods.name: clean-assets
methods.summary: clean-assets [exclude] — categorized cleanup report (dry-run; never deletes)

methods.name: delete-unused
methods.summary: delete-unused {ids} {confirm} — delete confirmed-unused assets, then rescan

methods.name: asset-usages
methods.summary: list scene usages of an asset

methods.name: thumbnail-cache
methods.summary: inspect or empty the thumbnail disk cache
